Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Part D Event (PDE)/Drug Characteristics Codebook │ July 2025 │ V 1.8 15 

DRUG_CVRG_STUS_CD 

LABEL: Drug Coverage Status Code 

DESCRIPTION: This field indicates whether or not the drug is covered by Medicare Part D. 

The Part D benefit does not cover all FDA-approved drugs. However, plan sponsors can offer an 
“enhanced” benefit package that covers non-Part D drugs, such as over-the-counter medications. 

SHORT NAME:
